# Tailor / Fashion Designer Atelier Site — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P3-tailoring-fashion-tailoring-atelier  
**Vertical slug:** tailoring-fashion  
**Niche family:** NF-COM-FSH (standalone)  
**Family role:** standalone  
**Research date:** 2026-04-26

## 1. Nigerian Business Reality
Nigeria's fashion industry is one of Africa's most vibrant, valued at over ₦1.3 trillion and growing at 7% annually. The Aso-Ebi culture (coordinated fabric at ceremonies) alone drives billions of naira in tailoring revenue during wedding season. Tailors range from roadside "fashion designers" (₦2,000–₦10,000 per outfit) to high-end Lagos/Abuja atelier designers (₦50,000–₦500,000). Lagos Fashion Week (LFDW) and Africa Fashion Week Nigeria are key industry events. Most tailors market on Instagram and WhatsApp but lack professional websites. Key services: native wear (agbada, buba, iro, gele), suits, aso-ebi sets, bridal, ready-to-wear.

## 2. Target Audience Profile
**Persona A — Chinwe Okeke, 32, Abuja**: Corporate executive ordering a custom Ankara power suit for a conference. Wants to see the designer's portfolio before booking a consultation. Finds via Instagram, wants a professional site to confirm legitimacy.
**Persona B — Sade Ogundimu, 28, Lagos (VI)**: Bridal client ordering aso-ebi sets for 20 bridesmaids. Needs price per set, delivery timeline, and fabric consultation WhatsApp.
**Persona C — Alhaji Musa Barau, 45, Kano**: Senior civil servant ordering a high-quality babban riga (grand boubou) for Eid. Wants a Kano-based tailor with reputable Hausa embroidery work.

## 3. Recommended Website Structure
**Home:** Hero (atelier name, "Crafted for the Nigerian Woman & Man" tagline, book consultation CTA), portfolio gallery (3-4 featured looks), service list (native, bridal, corporate, casual — price ranges in ₦), trust strip (years in business, pieces created, LFDW/GFW showcase, Instagram following).
**About:** Designer story, training background, inspirations, signature styles.
**Services:** Service categories with price ranges in ₦, turnaround time, measurement process, fabric options.
**Contact:** WhatsApp measurement consultation, studio address, booking form with NDPR.

## 4. Content Tone & Voice
Aspirational, culturally proud, creative. "Wear your heritage. Define your style." Primary CTA: "Book a Fitting via WhatsApp." Portfolio is the conversion tool — emphasise gallery heavily. Nigerian fabric names: Ankara, Aso-Oke, Adire, Kente, Lace, George. Avoid: generic western "couture" language disconnected from Nigerian context.

## 5. Trust Signal Inventory
LFDW/GTBANK Fashion Weekend participation badge; GTBank/Access Bank-funded designer programme; years in business; pieces created count; Instagram portfolio followers; client testimonials (Adaeze, Sade, Chinwe); delivery timeline guarantee; measurement confidentiality assurance; accepted payments: bank transfer, Paystack, 50% deposit on booking.

## 6. Image Direction
1. Nigerian woman in stunning custom Ankara power suit — Abuja office building background. Modern, professional.
2. Tailor at sewing machine surrounded by colourful fabric swatches — Lagos atelier, focused craft.
3. Aso-Ebi coordinated set — group of Nigerian bridesmaids in matching fabric, outdoor reception setting.
4. Close-up of expert hand-embroidery on a babban riga (Kano style grand boubou) — intricate detail.
5. Bridal gown fitting — Nigerian bride in white/cream, designer pinning adjustments, warm studio light.
6. Display of fabric options — Ankara, Aso-Oke, lace swatches laid out on table.
7. Designer sketching new collection — creative process, Abuja/Lagos studio backdrop.

## 7. Regulatory Compliance Checklist
No specific regulatory body for tailoring in Nigeria. CAC registration for formal fashion businesses. NAFDAC not applicable. Copyright: designers should note that original designs are copyrighted. NDPR: contact/booking forms collecting PII. If exporting: NEPC registration for fashion exporters.

## 8. Nigeria-First Compliance Checklist
| Requirement | Status |
|---|---|
| WhatsApp CTA home + contact | ✅ REQUIRED (measurement consult) |
| All prices in ₦ | ✅ REQUIRED |
| Nigerian cities | ✅ Lagos, Abuja, Kano, Aba |
| Nigerian fabric names | ✅ Ankara, Aso-Oke, Adire, George |
| Nigerian names in testimonials | ✅ Chinwe, Sade, Alhaji Musa |
| Bank transfer / Paystack / deposit | ✅ REQUIRED |
| Mobile-first 375px | ✅ REQUIRED |
| NDPR consent | ✅ REQUIRED |
